channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Grass verges, 18th March
item.description:
Can the grass verges be cut in Chieveley road please? They are very long Thanks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Chieveley Road, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned with rear sticking out into the road, 18th March
item.description:
Car abandoned opp entrance to Marlowe house car park. Back end sticking out, dangerous to other road users espicially at night. Ben there for over 24 hrs
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 195, Longlands Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tags on Santander Glass, 18th March
item.description:
Tags on Santander Glass Location: 498 Brixton Rd, London SW9 8EX
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brixton Road, Brixton, Greater London

item.title: Suitcase outside 42-44 Elverson Road, 18th March
item.description:
Discarded suitcase outside homes and also other items by the pathway entrance of Brookmill Park
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elverson Road, Deptford, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded Nitrous Oxide gas cans, 18th March
item.description:
Canisters seemingly used for nittrous oxide / laughing gas canisters (large commercial ones, not small ones) discarded on pavement in front of fence of 4 Verney Road and the entrance to the back of PC world

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Verney Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: CATV Double Manhole, 18th March
item.description:
The manhole cover moves/rocks creating a serious trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Crown Lane, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Mattresses, 18th March
item.description:
2 dirty mattresses dumped at the bottom of Pelton Rd on Union Wharf

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ballast Quay, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Possible illegal dumping of rubble, 18th March
item.description:
I believe that homeowners of either 41 or 43 wansunt road in Bexley postcode DA5 2DH have illegally dumped their garden waste of rubble and soil onto the woodland area at the back of their property. One can quite clearly see the path they used as there are wheel barrow tracks leading from their garden boundary and it can only be one house .Contained in the rubble their seems to be watering cans thrown away and other items I can lead you to the area if required entrance is halfway in wansunt rd

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wansunt Road, Coldblow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Man flytipping household rubbish, 18th March
item.description:
Video (this is a still of it) of man flytipping, looks like ironing board and bags of other things.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Newlands Park, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 18th March
item.description:
Street light out
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Walwyn Avenue, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unlit bollard, 18th March
item.description:
The bollard at the end of Towncourt Crescent (no asset ID number) is not lit at night.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Towncourt Crescent, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Estate agent (Haart) advertising sign left outside, 18th March
item.description:
Advertising sign for estate agent left attached to property wall despite no property being for let. Contacted estate agent over 2 weeks ago but not removed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 44, Cintra Park, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox by cemetery gates in Charlton Park Lane, 18th March
item.description:
Dead fox by gates of Charlton Cemetery.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Park Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Request to Reseed Bare Verge, 18th March
item.description:
Perhaps this is the wrong category but please can the Council ask their Contractor to restore the grass verge by the Kings Hall Road Crossing.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kings Hall Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: School Ahead Sign Moved, 18th March
item.description:
A vehicle has hit the School Ahead Sign on Kent House Road approaching Alexandra Infant School on the left hand side. Please can you arrange to be adjusted.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 290, Kent House Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Residents family continues to dump private items on the pavement outside the house, 18th March
item.description:
Constant fly tipping by resident at 9. I have seen it Complaints to council 10 odd clearances by fix my street over a few months these people show no regards for regulations or their neighbour's and need to be fined perhaps they will respond to monetary fines snd stop doing it.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): The Close, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped rubbish behind 91 Eglinton Hill on Mayplace Lane and elsewhere on Mayplace Lane, 18th March
item.description:
Items fly tipped, roughly 20kg, should be fairly easy to remove
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Eglinton Hill, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped fridge, 18th March
item.description:
Dumped fridge left on side of the road near Bence House, Rainsborough Avenue
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Rainsborough Avenue, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven rocking pavement slab, 18th March
item.description:
Outside the Marie Curie shop at Highbury & Islington corner, there is an uneven rocking pavement slab that has been like it for months. Sadly over the last few days my mum tripped over this and it has caused substantial face injuries resulting in hospital visits, scans and treatments. My husband and other neighbours have also commented on this recently, having tripped themselves and noticing it has been uneven and wobbling for many months. Please can this be fixed ASAP? British transport police were present at the incident (reference 479 14/3/2026) who were extremely helpful and transported us to hospital for review and treatment where we spent most of the night between 2 hospitals for relevant treatment. The form will only allow one image however I have many more to show the incident.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 314, St. Paul's Road, Highbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street light not working, 18th March
item.description:
Outside 13 Norcroft gardens se22 0bh the street light is not working at night. Over a week I have noticed it not working its is very dark which makes it feel unsafe.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22, Norcroft Gardens, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
